strengths: Successfully introduced loops around all three pegs
Maintained good instrument control during pusher advancement
weaknesses: Failed to complete the tail cutting phase before task completion notification
Did not follow through with the final step of the procedure
May have rushed through the final phase without proper verification

drills.name: Loop-to-tail completion sequence
drills.description: Practice the complete sequence from loop placement through tail cutting, pausing to verify each loop is secure before proceeding to cut tails.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the tail cutting phase.

drills.name: Task verification checkpoint drill
drills.description: After placing all loops, perform a systematic check of each loop's security before beginning tail cutting phase.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not follow through with the final step of the procedure.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing every phase of the task sequence rather than rushing to finish. Develop a systematic approach to verify loop security before tail cutting to ensure complete task execution.
